idea-plugin.name: Data Preprocessor
idea-plugin.description:
Clean and transform CSV data directly inside your JetBrains IDE.

Data Preprocessor helps data scientists, analysts, and developers prepare datasets faster without switching to external scripts or notebooks.

Load a CSV file, inspect each column, apply common preprocessing steps visually, and generate ready-to-run Python (pandas) code from your selected transformations.

Key features:
  • Column profiling: view type, null count, unique count, mean, median, standard deviation, min, and max
  • Missing value handling: drop rows or fill values using mean, median, mode, or a custom value
  • Duplicate removal: quickly detect and remove duplicate rows
  • Outlier removal: identify and remove outliers using the IQR method
  • Normalization: apply Min-Max scaling or Z-Score normalization to numeric columns
  • Type casting: convert columns to int, float, boolean, or string
  • Pandas code generation: export your preprocessing steps as ready-to-run Python code
Why use Data Preprocessor?
  • Save time on repetitive preprocessing tasks
  • Work without leaving your IDE
  • Visually prepare data, then export clean pandas code for production or notebooks
Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, DataGrip, and other JetBrains IDEs.

action.description: Load this CSV file into the Data Preprocessor tool window
Insert generated pandas preprocessing code at the caret
Open a CSV file in the Data Preprocessor
